message:
refactor(pages,lib,tests): streamline content architecture and update test suite

Pages:
- spec-explorer: major simplification, removing ~170 lines of redundant
  state management and layout code
- glossary: refactor term rendering and filtering
- architecture: simplify page structure
- globals.css: reorganize and clean up style definitions

Library:
- content.ts: expand content definitions with ~400 lines of improved
  section metadata, feature descriptions, and visualization mappings
- site-state.tsx: improve state management
- spec-docs.ts: refine document parsing
- test-architecture.ts: update test infrastructure helpers

Configuration:
- next.config.ts: add webpack and image optimization settings
- eslint.config.mjs: add rule configurations
- .vercelignore: add patterns for build exclusion
- types/global.d.ts: update type declarations

Tests:
- Update content tests, setup, and E2E specs (accessibility, hero-media,
  performance, smoke) to match refactored component APIs
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
